title: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
summary_full: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.
summary_public: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.
